{{Short description|Italian film festival in 2020}} {{Use dmy dates|date=August 2020}} {{Infobox Film festival | name = 77th Venice International Film Festival | image = File:77th Venice Film Festival poster.jpg | caption = Official festival poster by [[Lorenzo Mattotti]]. | opening = ''[[The Ties]]'' | closing = ''[[You Came Back]]'' | location = [[Venice]], [[Italy]] | founded = 1932 | awards = [[Golden Lion]]:
''[[Nomadland]]'' | host = [[Anna Foglietta]] |artistic_director= [[Alberto Barbera]] | number = 66{{cite web|title=Venice kick-starts international film again|url=https://www.cineuropa.org/en/newsdetail/390293|website=cineuropa.org|date=28 July 2020|access-date=28 July 2020|quote=From 2–12 September, the Venice International Film Festival is set to present 62 features...}} | date = 2 – 12 September 2020 | website = {{URL|labiennale.org/en/cinema}} | chronology = Venice Film Festival | preceded_by = [[76th Venice International Film Festival|76th]] | followed_by = [[78th Venice International Film Festival|78th]] }} [[File:Venice 2020 Red Carpet.jpg|thumb|A barrier built in compliance with the safety directions to enforce [[social distancing]] blocks the main red carpet during the Festival]] The '''77th annual [[Venice Film Festival|Venice International Film Festival]]''' was held from 2 to 12 September 2020, at [[Venice Lido]] in [[Italy]].{{cite web|title=Biennale Cinema 2020: 77th Venice International Film Festival|url=https://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/2020|website=labiennale.org|date=9 December 2019|publisher=[[La Biennale di Venezia]]|access-date=8 July 2020}} Albeit in a "more restrained format" due to the [[COVID-19 pandemic in Italy|COVID-19 pandemic]], the festival held all its screenings with public presence.{{cite web|title=Biennale Cinema: Main Features of the 77th Venice Film Festival|url=https://www.labiennale.org/en/news/biennale-cinema-main-features-77th-venice-film-festival|website=labiennale.org|publisher=[[Biennale di Venezia]]|date=7 July 2020|access-date=20 July 2020}}{{cite web|url=https://www.repubblica.it/spettacoli/cinema/2020/07/07/news/mostra_di_venezia_2020-261196749/|title=Mostra di Venezia, al via dal 2 settembre: programma ridotto e schermi all'aperto|first=Arianna|last=Finos|work=[[La Repubblica]]|date=7 July 2020|access-date=22 July 2020|language=it}} Australian actress [[Cate Blanchett]] was Jury President of the main competition.{{cite web|url=https://www.repubblica.it/spettacoli/cinema/2020/01/16/news/venezia_2020_cate_blanchett_presidente_di_giuria-245920801/|title=Venezia 2020, Cate Blanchett presidente di giuria|work=[[La Repubblica]]|date=16 January 2020|access-date=13 July 2020|language=it}} Italian actress [[Anna Foglietta]] hosted the opening and closing nights of the festival.{{cite web |date=8 July 2020 |title=Anna Foglietta Will Host the Opening and Closing Nights |url=https://www.labiennale.org/en/news/anna-foglietta-will-host-opening-and-closing-nights |access-date=8 July 2020 |website=labiennale.org |publisher=[[La Biennale di Venezia]]}} The [[Golden Lion]] was awarded to ''[[Nomadland]]'' by [[Chloé Zhao]].{{cite web |date=12 September 2020 |title=Venice Film Festival 2020 Winners: ''Nomadland'' Takes Golden Lion, Vanessa Kirby Is Best Actress |url=https://www.indiewire.com/2020/09/venice-film-festival-2020-winners-list-1234585982/ |access-date=12 September 2020 |work=IndieWire}} The festival opened with ''[[The Ties]]'' by [[Daniele Luchetti]], the first Italian film after 11 years to open the festival.{{cite web|url=https://variety.com/2020/film/global/venice-film-festival-opening-film-2020-1234715588/|first=Manori|last=Ravidran|title=Venice Film Festival to Open With Italy's 'Lacci' From Daniele Luchetti|work=[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]]|date=24 July 2020|access-date=24 July 2020}} And closed with ''[[You Came Back]]'' by [[Stefano Mordini]]. ==Juries== === Main Competition (''Venezia 77'') === * [[Cate Blanchett]], Australian actress and producer - Jury President{{cite web|url=https://variety.com/2020/film/global/johanna-hogg-ludivine-saignier-cate-blanchett-venice-jury-1234716766/|title=Joanna Hogg, Ludivine Sagnier, Christian Petzold Join Cate Blanchett on Venice Fest Main Jury|date=26 July 2020|access-date=26 July 2020|language=en}}{{Cite web|title=Actor Matt Dillon to Join the Venezia 77 International
